New role dashboards.question: What should ops_factory/factory_manager landing pages show with zero live steps today?
New role dashboards.answer: Match Phase 15 exactly — nav + landing page with honest "steps not yet configured for your role" blurb, same as design/production.

New role dashboards.question: Display labels and routes for the two new roles?

Assignment notifications.question: Should assignment notify in-app only, matching the v1.1 alerts-are-in-app-only decision?
Assignment notifications.answer: In-app only — reuse existing notifications table + bell/panel + poll pattern.

Assignment notifications.question: What should the notification say to the assignee?
Assignment notifications.answer: Project + step name — e.g. "You've been assigned to Design Stage on Usuma", linking straight to that step.
